createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of user profile creation

SavedOutput.title: Saved Output
SavedOutput.description: Saved academic manuscript polish, references or coach items.

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the output was saved

type.description: Type of tool (e.g. polish, checker, coach)

title.description: User defined or system generated title

data.description: Polished text blocks or list configurations

/users/{userId}.description: Register of registered students matching their Firebase authentication auth ID.

/users/{userId}/saved_outputs/{outputId}.description: Individual polished excerpts, citation matches, or ELT coach directions saved by the parent user.
